title: myrsine sandwicensis
intro: Myrsine sandwicensis, also known as the ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Myrsine sandwicensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Myrsine sandwicensis is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
